title: PR 102 fresh-session handoff
body: Session-handoff refresh for PR #102. Current evidence: PR title/body no longer describe the full branch diff, three fixed-but-unresolved threads need a 'fixed' dismissal, one schema docstring thread remains live, PR metadata thread remains live, Sonar quality gate is ERROR on four open issues, and no security hotspots are TO_REVIEW. Updating plan, repo continuity, thread record, and napkin for the next session.
